ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occ_title" TEXT /* Title of the occupation */,
  "occ_code" TEXT /* Code for the occupation (e.g., 35-0000) */,
  "est_employment" INTEGER /* Estimated number of people employed in the occupation */,
  "mean_wage" REAL /* Mean wage for the occupation */,
  "occ_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "occ_category" TEXT /* Category to which the occupation belongs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the occupation data was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_percentiles" (
  "wage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage percentile entry */,
  "occ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation the wage percentiles belong to */,
  "pct_10" REAL /* 10th percentile wage */,
  "pct_25" REAL /* 25th percentile wage */,
  "pct_50" REAL /* 50th percentile wage (median) */,
  "pct_75" REAL /* 75th percentile wage */,
  "pct_90" REAL /* 90th percentile wage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the wage percentiles data belongs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the wage percentile data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_percentiles_occ_id FOREIGN KEY ("occ_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the industry data was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_industry" (
  "occ_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation-industry relationship */,
  "occ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "employment_count" INTEGER /* Number of people employed in the occupation within the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the occupation-industry relationship data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occ_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_industry_occ_id FOREIGN KEY ("occ_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_industry_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_region" (
  "occ_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation-region relationship */,
  "occ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "employment_count" INTEGER /* Number of people employed in the occupation within the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the occupation-region relationship data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occ_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_region_occ_id FOREIGN KEY ("occ_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
